pages.title: Limitations (Current Version)
pages.text: $(li)[X] Only ITEMS filter works (fluids/energy coming in future) $(li)[X] No AE2/Refined Storage integration yet $(li)[X] No anti-cheat validation (players can hide chests in CM for "free" items) $(li)[X] No filters/whitelists (face transports ALL items)

pages.title: Design Limitations
pages.text: $(li)Factory must have consistent production over "long enough" intervals (can't handle random/conditional logic) $(li)Rates recalibrate on changes (add more machines → must re-simulate) $(li)Cannot simulate entity interactions (mob farms, animal breeding)
